items.title: Protected-Action Acceptance Profile v0.1
items.summary: A public control profile for proof-before-impact AI actions: protected action classes, acceptance boundary, receipt envelope, evidence set, PASS/HOLD/FAIL semantics, and test vectors.
items.description: MVG defines the before-impact acceptance boundary for agentic AI. Public profile only; not certification, legal advice, claim chart, implementation mapping, license grant, or compliance determination.

items.title: The HOLD Challenge
items.summary: Replayable proof that an AI action paused correctly before consequence. HOLD is protected restraint, not failure.
items.description: Public-safe challenge page for HOLD semantics, local replay posture, demo vectors, and proof-before-impact review.

items.title: Protected-Action Acceptance Test Vectors v0.1
items.summary: Public-safe PASS, HOLD, and FAIL sample receipts for the Protected-Action Acceptance Profile v0.1.
items.description: Demo receipts for current authority, stale policy epoch, missing lineage, conflicting receipts, revoked authority, render disclosure, clinical finalization, and out-of-scope infrastructure mutation.

items.title: Receipt Envelope Schema v0.1
items.summary: Plain-English guide to the Protected-Action Acceptance receipt envelope, with raw JSON schema and reason-code registry links.
items.description: Human-readable schema page for action identity, evidence posture, decision state, verification record, version discipline, and public-safe receipt boundaries.

items.title: MVG Local Verifier v0.1 ZIP
items.summary: CLI verifier bundle for local replay of public PASS / HOLD / FAIL demo receipts.
items.description: Downloadable public-safe local verifier bundle with CLI script, README, sample receipts, and expected outputs.

items.title: AI/TDM Reservation Notice
items.summary: Human-readable and machine-readable reservation against AI training, model training, embeddings, RAG corpus creation, semantic indexing, automated extraction, model evaluation, benchmarking, competitive reconstruction, or substitute-product use without written permission.
items.description: Terms control; signed agreements can override. Ordinary search links and short snippets may be allowed if robots instructions are respected and no AI/model training occurs.

items.title: Privacy Policy and Data Protection Notice v3.0.0 PDF
items.summary: Controlling PDF for MVG-PRIVACY-3.0.0. HTML is a convenience copy unless incorporated by written agreement.
items.description: Controlling PDF for MVG-PRIVACY-3.0.0.

items.title: Witness-ready One Protected Payment Action Challenge
items.description: A witness-ready route for one non-confidential protected payment-adjacent action. A qualified independent witness may observe scope, inputs, replay outputs, and no-claim posture under written scope.
